questions.question: What happens to Babylon the Great in this chapter?
questions.feedback: Fallen! Fallen is Babylon the Great! It has become a dwelling for demons.

questions.question: Who weeps over Babylon's destruction?
options: The merchants and kings of the earth
questions.correct: The merchants and kings of the earth
questions.feedback: The kings and merchants of the earth weep over Babylon's destruction.

questions.question: God's people are told to come out of Babylon so they won't share in her sins.
questions.feedback: Come out of her, my people, so you will not share in her sins.

questions.question: In one _____ such great wealth has been brought to ruin.
questions.feedback: In one hour such great wealth has been brought to ruin.

questions.question: A mighty angel threw a stone like a great _____ into the sea, saying Babylon will be thrown down.
questions.feedback: A mighty angel threw a boulder like a great millstone into the sea.
